title: Prostea oblongifolia

This family is part of the order Magnoliales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. Prostea oblongifolia is a species of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The classification of Prostea oblongifolia is further supported by its characteristics such as its distinctive flowers and seeds.
